description_long: This is a classic, boxy SUV with a two-tone exterior featuring a black body and a white roof. The vehicle has a utilitarian design with flat, angular surfaces and large, rectangular windows on both sides. The front end is equipped with a simple grille, round headlights, and a robust bumper, while the rear features a large window and a visible license plate. The SUV sits on four rugged wheels with pronounced wheel arches, suggesting off-road capability. Side mirrors are mounted on both front doors, and the vehicle appears to have four passenger-accessible doors. The overall appearance is reminiscent of vintage utility vehicles, designed for both urban and rugged environments.
description: A vintage-style, boxy SUV with a black body, white roof, large windows, and rugged wheels, exuding a utilitarian and classic look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, including the black body, white roof, three large windows, and two visible wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the large rear window, license plate, and the squared-off back design.
description_view_2: Side view of the right profile, mirroring the left with three windows and two wheels visible.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the grille, round headlights, front bumper, and both side mirrors.
attribute_wheel_design: simple steel rims with circular holes and a utilitarian finish
